zh.St. Peter Priory, Thurgarton, Nottingham: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾瑟爾加頓
zh.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Eyncourt於大約1100年出生在英國時，他的父親Ralph de Eyncourt30歲，母親Basilie of Nottinghamshire12歲。他於大約1130年與Agnes Brus結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1168年享年69歲。

zh-hans.St. Peter Priory, Thurgarton, Nottingham: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾瑟爾加頓
zh-hans.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Eyncourt于大约1100年出生在英国时，他的父亲Ralph de Eyncourt30岁，母亲Basilie of Nottinghamshire12岁。他于大约1130年与Agnes Brus结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1168年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Eyncourt was born about 1100, in England, his father, Ralph de Eyncourt, was 30 and his mother, Basilie of Nottinghamshire, was 12. He married Agnes Brus about 1130. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1168, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter d’Eyncourt est né environ 1100, à Angleterre, son père, Ralph d’Eyncourt, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Basilie of Nottinghamshire, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Brus environ 1130. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1168, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Eyncourt um 1100 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Eyncourt 30 und seine Mutter Basilie of Nottinghamshire 12. Er hat um 1130 Agnes Brus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1168 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Eyncourt è nato il circa 1100 nel England, il suo padre, Ralph de Eyncourt, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Basilie of Nottinghamshire, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Brus circa 1130. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1168, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.St. Peter Priory, Thurgarton, Nottingham: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスウルガートン
ja.Blankney, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニー
ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Eyncourtが約1100年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Ralph de Eyncourtは30歳，母Basilie of Nottinghamshireは12歳であった。約1130年にAgnes Brusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1168年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Eyncourt(이)가 대략 1100년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Eyncourt(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Basilie of Nottinghamshire(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1130년 Agnes Brus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1168년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.St. Peter Priory, Thurgarton, Nottingham: Thurgarton, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Eyncourt nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Eyncourt, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Basilie of Nottinghamshire, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Brus aproximadamente 1130. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1168, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Eyncourt родился около 1100 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Eyncourt было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilie of Nottinghamshire, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Brus около 1130 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1168 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Eyncourt nació aproximadamente 1100, en Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Eyncourt, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Basilie of Nottinghamshire, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Agnes Brus aproximadamente 1130. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1168, a la edad de 69 años.
